cost_components_summary: Annualised vehicle/platform, maintenance and non-energy service-delivery cost excluding explicit energy commodity purchases and excluding policy carbon costs.
input_basis_notes: Direct final-energy input only. Electricity and hydrogen take upstream emissions through their own supply sectors if those sectors are modelled.
emissions_boundary_notes: Direct on-site emissions only. Electricity-related emissions are excluded from end-use coefficients and should be represented by electricity-supply methods to avoid double counting. Biogenic CO2 from biomass combustion is excluded from CO2e unless otherwise noted.
rollout_limit_notes: Indicative national adoption bound only. No explicit vehicle stock turnover or infrastructure optimisation in Phase 1.
availability_conditions: All methods are available from 2025 in the reduced-form library, but uptake bounds implicitly reflect infrastructure and stock turnover constraints.
evidence_summary: Service calibration uses official BITRE passenger-km or tonne-km and official Australian road-energy totals; pathway direction uses Australian EV and road-freight studies.
derivation_method: Hybrid synthesis. Incumbent methods are calibrated to aggregate Australian road energy and freight/passenger task data; transition methods reflect Australian drivetrain efficiency and cost evidence with smoothed milestone trajectories.
review_notes: Coefficient is a nationalised average across heterogeneous freight tasks; should be refined with payload class splits in Phase 2.
candidate_expansion_pathway: Split by light-duty passenger, buses, vans/light commercial, medium trucks and heavy articulated trucks, with explicit stock rollover.
times_or_vedalang_mapping_notes: These reduced-form service methods can map to demand technologies in TIMES with vintaged vehicle stocks, charging/fuelling infrastructure and explicit occupancy/load factors.

input_basis_notes: Direct final-energy input only. Electricity and hydrogen take upstream emissions through their own supply sectors if those sectors are modelled.
emissions_boundary_notes: Direct on-site emissions only. Electricity-related emissions are excluded from end-use coefficients and should be represented by electricity-supply methods to avoid double counting. Biogenic CO2 from biomass combustion is excluded from CO2e unless otherwise noted.
rollout_limit_notes: Indicative national adoption bound only. No explicit vehicle stock turnover or infrastructure optimisation in Phase 1.
availability_conditions: All methods are available from 2025 in the reduced-form library, but uptake bounds implicitly reflect infrastructure and stock turnover constraints.
evidence_summary: Service calibration uses official BITRE passenger-km or tonne-km and official Australian road-energy totals; pathway direction uses Australian EV and road-freight studies.
derivation_method: Hybrid synthesis. Incumbent methods are calibrated to aggregate Australian road energy and freight/passenger task data; transition methods reflect Australian drivetrain efficiency and cost evidence with smoothed milestone trajectories.
review_notes: Useful as a freight sensitivity method where battery range or charging-infrastructure limits bind.
candidate_expansion_pathway: Split by light-duty passenger, buses, vans/light commercial, medium trucks and heavy articulated trucks, with explicit stock rollover.
